queries.question: List currency exchange services and commodity trading firms established in 2000.
queries.sql:
SELECT Currency_Exchange_Service.name
FROM Currency_Exchange_Service
WHERE Currency_Exchange_Service.Year_of_establishment = 2000
UNION
SELECT Commodity_Trading_Firm.name
FROM Commodity_Trading_Firm
WHERE Commodity_Trading_Firm.Year_of_establishment = 2000
